title: KAHEIGN Fishing Landing Net, 130CM Telescopic Fishing Net Extendable from 42 to 130cm for Bird Fish Carp Trout Catch Release (Green)
features: [High quality] The net is made of rubber impregnated net and non-absorbent coating, soft and will not harm fish scales, and can prevent the accumulation of water
[Foldable] The fishing net is foldable and telescopic, the handle is made of aluminum, and the two sides of the net are fixed by aluminum tube, which is more solid
[Easy to use] The fishing net with metal buckle can be easily installed, and the length can be adjusted by the locking system of the rotating rod
[Size] Folded length: 42cm, fully expanded length: 130cm, metal mesh circle diameter: about 43cm; maximum load capacity: 5KG
[Applicable] Suitable for fishing carp, trout and other big fish, but also for small birds, butterflies, dragonflies, etc. Perfect for fishing in boats, rivers, seas and streams
description: Product description KAHEIGN 130CM Telescopic Fishing Landing Net Suitable for fishing carp, trout and other big fish, but also for small birds, butterflies, dragonflies, etc. Perfect for fishing in boats, rivers, seas and streams. Feature: - The net is made of rubber impregnated net and non-absorbent coating, soft and will not harm fish scales, and can prevent the accumulation of water. - The fishing net is foldable and telescopic, the handle is made of aluminum, and the two sides of the net are fixed by aluminum tube, which is more solid. - The fishing net with metal buckle can be easily installed, and the length can be adjusted by the locking system of the rotating rod. - Folded length: 42cm, fully expanded length: 130cm, metal mesh circle diameter: about 43cm; maximum load capacity: 5KG. Specification: Extended length: 130cm Folded length: 42cm Material: aluminum alloy Weight: 300g Color: green Package included: 1 x Fishing Net Directions [General Use]: Unfold the telescopic fishing net, adjust the length as needed, and use the metal mesh circle to scoop up fish or other intended catches. Safety Warning Caution: Handle sharp objects carefully. Avoid placing hands and face on the net path when extending. Avoid releasing captured animals in an inappropriate environment. See more
